column1: Validation
A household must have 1 household reference person.
A private hire driver should be at least 30 years old and Singapore citizen.
A private hire driver should be less than 75 years old based on the age limit set by LTA.

Absence hours worked per week should not be blank, negative or more than 168 hours. If not done so, please select the check boxto indicate that respondent are unable to provide the number of hours of absence or if do not know whether respondent has hours of absence.
Admin Data - DOB is wrong, please amend accordingly.
Are you sure a civil engineering/building construction labourer is not working in the construction industry?

Are you sure a Employment Pass, S Pass, Work Permit or training pass holder is in an institutional unit in Singapore, or outside Singapore overseas for more than 6 months (i.e. away from Singapore for more than 6 months)?

Are you sure a hawker/stall holder (excluding prepared food or drinks) is working in the food courts, coffee shops and eating houses or stalls selling cooked food and prepared drinks? Pls check if occupation is 52120 hawker/stall holder (prepared food or drinks) instead.

Are you sure a hawker/stall holder (excluding prepared food or drinks) is working in the food courts, coffee shops and eating houses or stalls selling cooked food and prepared drinks? Pls check if occupation is 52120 hawker/stall holder (prepared food or drinks) instead.
Are you sure a legislator, senior government / stat board official is not working  in the central bank or provident funding industry?
Are you sure a male respondent is working part-time to look after his own children aged 12 & below?
Are you sure a married household reference person has a partner staying in the same household?
Are you sure a person aged > 26 years is still a student on vacation job or paid internship, or working while awaiting examination results or NS call-up?
Are you sure a person aged 15 has highest academic qualification is Secondary?
Are you sure a person in this occupation is in casual/on-call employment?
Are you sure a person less than 18 years old is not enrolled in school?
Are you sure a person who is outside Singapore overseas or is in institutional unit is the household reference person?
Are you sure a person who is working part-time mainly because he/she is pursuing full-time/part-time studies is available for additional work?
Are you sure a person who is working part-time mainly because he/she is pursuing full-time/part-time studies is willing to work additional hours?
Are you sure a person who worked in this OCCUPATION is at this AGE and with this EDUCATION?

Are you sure a person working part-time because he/she could not find a full-time job is not willing to work additional hours, whether in the current job or in an another job where the working hours are longer?
Are you sure a self-employed person is in these industries?

Are you sure a tertiary educated person aged below 40 is not working or looking for work because he believes no suitable work available or lacks necessary qualification, training, skills or experience?

Are you sure age difference between (i) parents-in-law 06 and husband/wife of the household reference person 02; (ii) son 03 and grandson 08; (iii) son-in-law 04 and grandson 08 is less than 15 years?
Are you sure age difference between child and household reference person is less than 15 years?
Are you sure age difference between the parents to the household reference person is more than 15 years?
Are you sure an own account worker is working as a managing director, chief executive or general manager? Those who do not have at least 2 managers reporting to them should not be coded here.
Are you sure an own account worker is working in this occupation? Pls check employment status and occupation coding.
Are you sure employment status for babysitter is not Own Account Worker?
Are you sure employment status for cleaners, labourers and related workers is Employer?
Are you sure employment status of a person working as Management Executive is not Employee?
Are you sure household reference person and child are not of the same Identification Type? Child is SC/PR but household reference person is not.
Are you sure household reference person and child are not of the same Identification Type? Household reference person is SC/PR but child is not.
Are you sure household reference person and his/her parent(s) are not of the same race?
Are you sure household reference person and his/her wife/husband have different marital status?
Are you sure household reference person is less than 18 years old?
Are you sure main reason for being outside of the labour force is doing housework or looking after children for respondent who is a male?

Are you sure main reason for being outside the labour force is Option 8 [Care for own children aged 12 and below] when the individual does not have a child aged 12 years and below? If main reason is to take care of child aged above 12 or grandchildren, main reason should be Option 09 [Care for families (including own children aged above 12 and grandchildren) / relatives]  instead.
Are you sure male aged 25-45 years cannot find suitable work or need not work because he has sufficient financial support?
Are you sure marital status of BOTH parents is different?
Are you sure marital status of parent is single?
Are you sure marital status of person aged less than or equal to 21 years is not 'single'?
Are you sure Parent is younger than household reference person (i.e. Age)?
Are you sure parent/parent-in-law is less than 30 years old?
Are you sure person has been unemployed for 52 weeks and longer?
Are you sure person is a single parent/grandparent?
Are you sure person is aged 100 years and above?
Are you sure person working in a managerial or professional job only has primary or lower qualifications?
Are you sure Singaporean male aged > 30 years has never worked before?
Are you sure Singaporean or PR with degree qualifications is working in a clerical job?
Are you sure Singaporean or PR with university & above qualifications is working in craftsmen & cleaning related job?
Are you sure Son/Daughter is older than household reference person (i.e.their year of birth)?
Are you sure the age difference between the household reference person and son-in-law/daughter-in-law is less than 15 years?
Are you sure the certificate was not obtained in Singapore?

Are you sure the child's race is neither that of the father nor mother? (Exclude cases where the son/daughter's race is Eurasian, and one parent is born in an Asian country and the other parent born in an European country from this check)

Are you sure the current labour force status of a Student's Pass holder who is working is not either one of the following:  Schooling but currently working in vacation job, schooling but currently undergoing paid internship, working while awaiting examination results or working while schooling?
Are you sure the education institution awarding the ITE or related qualification is not ITE?
Are you sure the educational attainment of person aged 15 years is GCE 'N' level or higher?
Are you sure the Employment Pass, S Pass, Work Permit Holder or foreigner on training pass is currently not working (i.e. unemployed)?
Are you sure the foreigner who is working in Singapore is not an employee?

Are you sure the health services manager, medical doctor, nursing professional, dentist, physiotherapist, audiologist, speech therapist, occupational therapist, medical diagnostic radiographer, enrolled/assistant nurse, dental assistant/therapist, medical/dental receptionist or healthcare assistant is not in the health & social services industry?

Are you sure the health services manager, medical doctor, nursing professional, dentist, physiotherapist, audiologist, speech therapist, occupational therapist, medical diagnostic radiographer, enrolled/assistant nurse, dental assistant/therapist, medical/dental receptionist or healthcare assistant is not in the health & social services industry?
Are you sure the highest educational attainment of person aged =  18 is degree and above?
Are you sure the highest educational attainment of person aged 18 and below is diploma related qualification?
Are you sure the hours worked for a part-timer is 35 hours or more?
Are you sure the household reference person and husband/wife are of the same sex?. If so please amend relationships as 'Partner'.

Are you sure the identification type is dependant pass? Dependants of Singapore citizens or permanent residents, or parents of Employment/S Pass holders are usually on social visit pass (option 07) rather than Dependant Pass.
Are you sure the industry of a Judge, Government associate professionals , police officer, narcotics officer or prison officer is not in the public administration & defence?
Are you sure the industry of a primary school teacher is not primary school?
Are you sure the industry of a secondary school teacher is not secondary school?
Are you sure the industry of an education and training institution manager or relief teacher is not Education industry?
Are you sure the industry of this person is not in financial & insurance services?

Are you sure the main reason for working part-time rather than full-time is to care for own children aged 12 years and below when the individual does not have a child aged 12 years and below in the household? If main reason is to take care of child aged above 12 or grandchildren, main reason should be option 06 Care for families (including own children aged above 12 and grandchildren) / relatives instead.
Are you sure the person aged > 35 years is still pursuing full-time / part-time study or awaiting start of academic year / NS call-up / examination results or attending courses?
Are you sure the person works 1 hour every week?
Are you sure the respondent on student's pass is aged above 25 years?
Are you sure the vocational/WSQ certificate was not obtained in Singapore?
Are you sure this person left  his last job more than 40 years ago? [Compare his current age and see if it is possible that he left his last job more than 40 years ago]
Certificate (under Highest Academic Qualification) is awarded by the Polytechnics.  Are you sure the education institution that awarded this qualification is a local autonomous university or ITE?
Certificate (under vocational qualification) is 'LaSalle-SIA Diploma'. Are you sure this certificate was not awarded by LaSalle?
Certificate (under vocational qualification) is 'NAFA Diploma'. Are you sure this certificate was not awarded by NAFA?
Employment status for Babysitter should be Own Account Worker.
Employment status of Legislator, Senior Government & Statutory Board official, Judge, or Government Associate Professional, Police Officer, Narcotics Officer, or Prison Officer should be Employee.
Extra hours worked per week should not be blank, negative or more than 168 hours. ACases will be flagged. Please provide the number of extra hours worked per week by the respondant.
For this RELH, check that DOB is input correctly. Are you sure Age is less than 15?
For this SSOC 2024 code 13210 please select the following SSOC2020 codes: 13210/13291
For this SSOC 2024 code 13410 please select the following SSOC2020 codes: 13459/13410
For this SSOC 2024 code 24132, please select the following SSOC2020 code: 33492/24132
For this SSOC 2024 code 25123, please select the following SSOC2020 code: 21662/21669/25123
For this SSOC 2024 code 73160, please select the following SSOC2020 code: 71323/73160

Highest Vocational Qualification and Institution that awarded this qualification are inconsistent. NITEC/master NITEC or equivalent qualifications are not awarded by local universities, local polytechnics, SkillsFuture Singapore or the former WDA, NAFA or LASALLE.

Household reference person is a work permit holder but his/her husband/wife /children/parent/parent-in-law is on social visit pass or Dependant's Pass. Please verify their relationship to household reference person and identification type.
Household reference person is married. Pls check if his/her wife/husband is staying in the same household, if yes pls collect information of the wife/husband as a household member.
Household reference person is single/widowed/divorced and should not have a husband/wife.
If person left previous job 1 month to less than 2 months ago, duration of unemployment cannot be more than or equal to 8 weeks.
If person left previous job 2 months to less than 3 months ago, duration of unemployment cannot be more than or equal to 12 weeks.
If person left previous job 4 months to less than 5 months ago, duration of unemployment cannot be more than or equal to 21 weeks.
If person left previous job 5 months to less than 6 months ago, duration of unemployment cannot be more than or equal to 26 weeks.
If person left previous job 7 months to less than 8 months ago, duration of unemployment cannot be more than or equal to 34 weeks.
Industry of Singapore Armed Forces Personnel should be Armed Forces, Police or Civil Defence.
Industry of university, polytechnic & other higher education teachers should be in 85301 to 85509.
It is rare for someone aged below 20 to be working in such occupations.  To verify if there is any misreporting or miscoding of age or occupation
Job offer received but no application submitted - please verify
Marital status of Husband/Wife should be married or separated.
NIE Diploma (under vocational qualification) should be awarded by NIE. Are you sure  this certificate was not awarded by NIE?
NRIC has a different HREFPIN in the previous month. Please retain HREFPIN from previous month. (HREFPIN= SRNs+MEMBER_NO)

Nursery farm worker or supervisor is referring to someone working in a place where young plants and trees are grown for sale or planting elsewhere. If you are referring to childcare nursery workers or nurses, please select appropriate occupation code.
Others' was selected, please see if it can be recoded.
Others' was specified, interviewer has not indicated any remarks or has remarks with less than 10 characters. Please confirm that the 'Others' option cannot be grouped into the options provided.
Person aged > 16 years and is currently pursuing full-time study; his educational attainment should not be below primary qualification.
Person aged > 20 years and is currently pursuing full-time study; his educational attainment should not be below secondary qualification.
Person with NRIC /FIN beginning with 'S' or 'T' should be a SC/PR.
Person with NRIC /FIN beginning with 'S' or 'T' should be either a citizen or permanent resident. Please verify
Please check SSOC with Employment Status.
Please confirm in system if DOB is input correctly as Age is 0.
Please enter digits without commas or decimals.
Please verify identification type of this person. Foreign children of Singapore citizens/Permanent residents are usually on social visit pass (option 07) rather than Dependant Pass.
Please verify identification type of this person. Foreign husband/wife of Singapore citizens/Permanent residents are usually on social visit pass (option 07) rather than Dependant Pass.

Please verify unemployment duration of respondent. Unemployment duration should be counted from the point where respondent started actively looking for jobs after leaving the last job, and so may be shorter than the time elapsed since respondent left the last job.
R. is below 17 years old and has more than an O level  education but is not in full-time studies.
R. is unemployed and 15-19 years old but is not enrolled in school/course/not awaiting NS callup while looking for work.
R. is unemployed and 20-24 years old with upper secondary education but is not enrolled in school/course/not awaiting NS callup while looking for work.
R. is unemployed in current month but increase in unemployment duration is 5 weeks or more.
R. is unemployed in current month but unemployment duration has declined from previous month.
R. s rise in highest qualification attained through WSQ is very high.

Real estate/insurance agents are usually own account workers. If the person reports himself as an employee in this occupation, please check if he is receiving a regular monthly income as a real estate/ insurance agent?
Respondent indicated he or she has ever worked before , please verify and confirm
Respondent indicated he or she has retired before in the previous month, please verify and confirm.
Respondent's EDUC is different from previous month, please verify and confirm.
Respondent's WSQ_EDUC is different from previous month, please verify and confirm.

Same household cannot have more than 1 household reference persons.

Self-employed individuals in this occupation are typically own account workers instead of employers. If respondent is self-employed and did not employ any paid employees, he is an own account worker rather than employer. Self-employed with no employees but supervising other own account workers are not employers.

Such certificates (under vocational qualification) are generally awarded by either private institutions or public sector training institutions. Are you sure this certificate was not awarded by either a private institution or a public sector  training institution?

The first three digits of the respondent's occupational code are 111. This major group corresponds to Legislators and Senior Officials within the government. If the respondent does not belong to this major group, please recode to the appropriate code if necessary. Correct coding can be manually suppressed.
There are changes to Actvity Status, please verify.
There are changes to NRIC, please verify.
There are changes to occupation code from previous month but continues employment with current company , please check if there are changes in the job title or job description.
There are changes to occupation code from previous month, please check if there are changes in the job title or job desc.
There are changes to occupation code twin code from previous month, please check if there are changes in the job title or job desc.
There are changes to previous job occupation code,  please check if there are changes in the job title or job desc.
There are duplicated NRIC in the survey, please seek Ops assistance to resolve this.
There are high income difference from previous month, please check if the income is correct.
There are more than one response with the same DOB and same last 5 characters in their NRIC. Please check if the information are correct or if they are duplicate cases.
There should not be a duplicate member number.
This respondent has degree qualifications. Are you sure his/her occupation is police officer (54121) and not police inspector (33550)?
This respondent has diploma or higher qualifications. Are you sure his/her occupation is enrolled/assistant nurse (32200) and not registered nurse and other nursing professionals (22200)?
Type of employment of person working in vacation job or undergoing paid internship is usually not permanent.
Unemployment duration cannot be longer than the number of months elapsed since leaving last job.
